chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 115 – The Nazool (Arrival) of Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>, may the Salawat of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> be upon them<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/357)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/357)
text: خَرَجَ الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ ( عليه السلام ) إِلَى مَكَّةَ سَنَةً مَاشِياً فَوَرِمَتْ قَدَمَاهُ فَقَالَ لَهُ بَعْضُ مَوَالِيهِ لَوْ رَكِبْتَ لَسَكَنَ عَنْكَ هَذَا الْوَرَمُ فَقَالَ كَلَّا إِذَا أَتَيْنَا هَذَا الْمَنْزِلَ فَإِنَّهُ يَسْتَقْبِلُكَ أَسْوَدُ وَ مَعَهُ دُهْنٌ فَاشْتَرِ مِنْهُ وَ لَا تُمَاكِسْهُ فَقَالَ لَهُ مَوْلَاهُ بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَ أُمِّي مَا قَدِمْنَا مَنْزِلًا فِيهِ أَحَدٌ يَبِيعُ هَذَا الدَّوَاءَ فَقَالَ لَهُ بَلَى إِنَّهُ أَمَامَكَ دُونَ الْمَنْزِلِ

فَسَارَا مِيلًا فَإِذَا هُوَ بِالْأَسْوَدِ فَقَالَ الْحَسَنُ ( عليه السلام ) لِمَوْلَاهُ دُونَكَ الرَّجُلَ فَخُذْ مِنْهُ الدُّهْنَ وَ أَعْطِهِ الثَّمَنَ فَقَالَ الْأَسْوَدُ يَا غُلَامُ لِمَنْ أَرَدْتَ هَذَا الدُّهْنَ فَقَالَ لِلْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ فَقَالَ انْطَلِقْ بِي إِلَيْهِ فَانْطَلَقَ فَأَدْخَلَهُ إِلَيْهِ فَقَالَ لَهُ بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَ أُمِّي لَمْ أَعْلَمْ أَنَّكَ تَحْتَاجُ إِلَى هَذَا أَ وَ تَرَى ذَلِكَ وَ لَسْتُ آخُذُ لَهُ ثَمَناً إِنَّمَا أَنَا مَوْلَاكَ وَ لَكِنِ ادْعُ اللَّهَ أَنْ يَرْزُقَنِي ذَكَراً سَوِيّاً يُحِبُّكُمْ أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ فَإِنِّي خَلَّفْتُ أَهْلِي تَمْخَضُ فَقَالَ انْطَلِقْ إِلَى مَنْزِلِكَ فَقَدْ وَهَبَ اللَّهُ لَكَ ذَكَراً سَوِيّاً وَ هُوَ مِنْ شِيعَتِنَا .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ali Bin Al Nu’man, from Sandal, from Abu Asama,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup> went out to Makkah one year, walking. So his<sup>asws</sup> feet swelled up. So some of his<sup>asws</sup> slave said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘If only you<sup>asws</sup> were to ride, this would settle from you<sup>asws</sup>’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Never! When we come to this encampment, so a black man would welcome you and with him would be some oil. So buy it from him and do not haggle (for its price)’. So his<sup>asws</sup> slave said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘May my father and my mother be (sacrificed) for you<sup>asws</sup>! There is no such encampment in front of us wherein there would be anyone selling this medicine’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said to him: ‘Yes, it is in front of you beside the encampment’.

So they travelled for a mile, and there was a black man. So Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> said to his<sup>asws</sup> slave: ‘Below you is the man, so take the oil from him and give him the price’. So the black man said, ‘O slave! For whom are you intending this oil?’ So he said, ‘For Al-Hasan<sup>asws</sup> Bin Ali<sup>asws</sup>’. So he said, ‘Come with me to him<sup>asws</sup>’. So he came over to him<sup>asws</sup> and said to him<sup>asws</sup>, ‘By my father and my mother being (sacrificed) for you<sup>asws</sup>! I did not know you<sup>asws</sup> were needy to this. Had I known that, I would not have taken a price for it. But rather, I am your<sup>asws</sup> slave. But, supplicate to Allah<sup>azwj</sup> that He<sup>azwj</sup> should Grace me a male child, healthy, who would be loving you<sup>asws</sup>, the People<sup>asws</sup> of the Household, for I left behind my wife, expecting’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Go to your house, so Allah<sup>azwj</sup> has Endowed a healthy male child to you, and he is from our<sup>asws</sup> Shias’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ahmad ibn Muhammad and Muhammad ibn Yahya have narrated from Muhammad ibn al-Hassan from ya‘qub ibn Yazid from ibn abu ‘Umayr from his people from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “Al-Hassan (a.s.) has said, ‘Allah has two cities. One is in the east and the other is in the west. They have a boundary around them that is made of iron and each one has a million doors. Seven thousand different languages exist therein and know all those languages and all that is therein. There is no one who would possess Leadership with Divine Authority except me and my brother, al-Husayn (a.s.).’
